title: Israel Launches Airstrikes in Lebanon After 4 Soldiers Are Killed
summary_full: The violence involving Israel and Iran-backed Hezbollah militants added to pressure on the U.S.-Iran deal, which calls for fighting to stop on all fronts, including in Lebanon.
summary_public: The violence involving Israel and Iran-backed Hezbollah militants added to pressure on the U.S.-Iran deal, which calls for fighting to stop on all fronts, including in Lebanon.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran-backed Hezbollah militants added to pressure on the U.S.-Iran deal
